history.changes: Initial skill based on original verbose skill. Added guidance on using pdfminer/pypdf for text extraction, merging, and page counting. Noted LSP errors should be ignored.

Added explicit warning that PDF metadata fields (/Title, /Author) are almost always empty and must not be relied on. Added section on extracting info from rendered text content using pdfminer + regex. Emphasized two-step workflow: extract and print raw text first, then parse based on actual output. Added rule to never use PDF metadata fields.
